name: Roasted Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500 degrees F (260 degrees C).
2. Arrange the asparagus in a single layer in a shallow baking pan.
3. Brush the olive oil on each asparagus spear using a pastry brush.
4. Roast for 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender but still crisp, turning the spears occasionally for even cooking and to prevent browning.
5. Remove from oven and place asparagus spears on a serving platter.
6. Sprinkle with shredded Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve with lemon wedges.
